response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack/web developer with strong testing discipline and craftsmanship values, but the role requires 8 years of C++ specifically plus 5 years building large-scale distributed/compute infrastructure. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months in 2014-2015) and no cloud compute platform leadership; primary languages are TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang. Core hard requirements are not met.
strengths: Long-term software craftsmanship background with TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development experience
Experience with high-throughput microservices at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic handling millions of requests/second
Demonstrated mentoring and teaching through workshops, talks, and Selenium course development
concerns: Only ~6 months of professional C++ experience versus the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of cloud compute platform, distributed systems leadership, or production cloud architecture at scale
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / large-scale infrastructure leadership
Strong engineering craftsmanship and mentoring background
